tagline: The All-In-One HELOC Proposal Tool for Loan Officers

tiers.name: Starter
tiers.label: Professional Quotes in Seconds
tiers.description: 2 tools in 1 — HELOC Quote Builder + Refinance Architect. 14-day free Pro trial included.

features.name: HELOC Quote Builder
features.description: Full rate matrix with 3 tiers, real-time snapshot, credit score, home value, and mortgage balance inputs.

features.name: Refinance Architect
features.description: Side-by-side refi comparison with monthly/yearly/lifetime savings projections.

features.name: PDF, Screenshot & HTML Email
features.description: Export proposals as PDF, screenshot, or branded HTML email.

features.name: Lender Parser (Figure/NFTYDoor)
features.description: Paste lender rate sheets and auto-extract rates, fees, and terms.

features.name: LO Profile & Branding
features.description: Your name, NMLS, company, headshot, and logo on every proposal.

features.name: URL Shortener
features.description: Shorten quote links for easy sharing via SMS and email.

features.name: Address Autocomplete
features.description: Smart address autocomplete for faster data entry.

features.name: Rate Configuration
features.description: Set and manage your HELOC rate matrix.

tiers.name: Pro
tiers.label: Close More Deals
tiers.description: The complete HELOC machine. Leads, AI, CRM sync — stop losing leads.

new_features.name: Leads Pipeline
new_features.description: Track every borrower from first contact to funded. Filter by status, source, or stage.

new_features.name: Ezra AI — Full Power (50/day)
new_features.description: AI-powered sales strategy, objection handling, scripts, and follow-up coaching.

new_features.name: Voice Input
new_features.description: Talk to Ezra hands-free. Voice-powered AI assistance.

new_features.name: CRM Auto-Sync (Bonzo, GHL, FUB)
new_features.description: Two-way sync with Bonzo, GoHighLevel, and Follow Up Boss.

new_features.name: Client Quote Pages + AI Chat
new_features.description: Shareable client-facing quote pages with Ezra AI chat.

new_features.name: Outbound Webhooks
new_features.description: Push quote events to any external URL for custom integrations.

new_features.name: Debt Consolidation & Break-Even
new_features.description: Analyze debt consolidation savings and break-even timelines.

new_features.name: Paste Rates Import
new_features.description: Import Figure rates with one paste.

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.label: Your Brokerage, Powered by AI
tiers.description: 5 team seats, white label, unlimited AI. Scale your brokerage with your brand.

new_features.name: 5 Team Seats (+$49/seat)
new_features.description: Include up to 5 LOs on your plan. Additional seats $49/mo each.

new_features.name: White Label
new_features.description: Your logo, colors, and custom domain. Clients see your brand, not ours.

new_features.name: Custom Domain for Client Links
new_features.description: Branded quote URLs under your own domain.

new_features.name: n8n Workflow Automation
new_features.description: Connect to 400+ apps. Automate follow-ups, notifications, and data sync.

new_features.name: Unlimited Ezra AI
new_features.description: No daily caps on AI usage.

new_features.name: Custom AI Prompts
new_features.description: Tune Ezra's responses to match your sales style.

new_features.name: HeyGen AI Video
new_features.description: Generate personalized AI video greetings for clients.

new_features.name: Analytics Dashboard
new_features.description: Track quote views, clicks, and lead engagement.

new_features.name: Priority Support (< 4hr)
new_features.description: Direct access to our team with fast response times.

faq.q: Can I upgrade or downgrade anytime?
faq.a: Yes. Changes take effect immediately. If you upgrade, you get instant access to new features. If you downgrade, you keep access until the end of your billing cycle.
Yes! Every new account gets a 14-day free Pro trial — full access to leads, Ezra AI, CRM sync, and all Pro features. No credit card required.
After 14 days, your account drops to Starter ($79/mo). You keep your quotes and data, but lose access to Pro features like leads, AI, and CRM sync. Upgrade anytime to get them back.

faq.q: Can I use this for my whole team?
faq.a: Yes! Enterprise includes 5 team seats. Additional seats are $49/mo each. Contact us for custom team pricing.
